name: WF: 10- Global Guardrail Authority Enforcement and Decision Ledger

assignments.name: reason
assignments.value: Simulation mode - execution blocked. No side effects permitted.

assignments.name: reason
assignments.value: Contradiction detected in decision contract - escalating to Founder

assignments.name: reason
assignments.value: ={{ 'Circuit breaker triggered - ' + $json.failure_count + ' failures detected. Workflow ' + $json.source_workflow + ' has been frozen.' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 WF-10 CIRCUIT BREAKER: ' + $json.source_workflow + ' FROZEN' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '⚠️ CRITICAL ALERT

Workflow: ' + $json.source_workflow + '
Failure Count: ' + $json.failure_count + '
Department: ' + $json.department + '
Task: ' + $json.task_type + '

The workflow has been automatically deactivated due to repeated failures.

Immediate action required.

Request ID: ' + $json.request_id + '
Timestamp: ' + $json.timestamp }}

assignments.name: reason
assignments.value: All gates passed - execution authorized by WF-10

assignments.name: ledger_entry
assignments.value: ={{ { request_id: $json.request_id, source_workflow: $json.source_workflow, department: $json.department, task_type: $json.task_type, mode: $json.mode, confidence: $json.confidence, risk_level: $json.risk_level, execution_allowed: $json.execution_allowed, decision_status: $json.decision_status, reason: $json.reason, enforced_by: 'WF-10', timestamp: $now.toISO(), input_contract: $json, audit: $json.audit } }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '⚠️ WF-10 CONTRADICTION: ' + $json.source_workflow }}
parameters.message:
={{ '🔴 CONTRADICTION DETECTED

Workflow: ' + $json.source_workflow + '
Department: ' + $json.department + '
Task: ' + $json.task_type + '

Details:
' + $json.contradiction_details + '

Reason: ' + $json.reason + '

Request ID: ' + $json.request_id + '
Timestamp: ' + $json.timestamp + '

This decision has been blocked and requires your review.' }}

parameters.text:
={{ '🛑 *WF-10 HIGH RISK BLOCK*

*Workflow:* ' + $json.source_workflow + '
*Department:* ' + $json.department + '
*Task:* ' + $json.task_type + '
*Risk Level:* ' + $json.risk_level + '
*CREA Status:* ' + $json.crea_status + '
*Reason:* ' + $json.reason + '

*Request ID:* ' + $json.request_id + '
*Timestamp:* ' + $json.timestamp }}

assignments.name: reason
assignments.value: Confidence below execution threshold — human approval required

parameters.errorMessage: ={{ "WF-10 WORKFLOW ID RESOLUTION FAILED: " + $json.reason + " | Source workflow: " + $json.source_workflow + " | Request ID: " + $json.request_id }}

nodes.name: ISSUE B: Skip if Already Decided

main.node: ISSUE B: Skip if Already Decided
